methodology: Black-Scholes modeled options on real yfinance intraday underlying data + VIX-derived IV. Modeled fills, not real market quotes. Good for relative ranking; approximate $.

ranked.strategy_name: Vertical Credit Spread (bull put / bear call)
ranked.notes: Defined-risk premium selling. Spread approval required (backtest-only).
Cheaper OTM long — higher leverage, lower win rate.
